# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Parameters:
  VpcCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Description: The CIDR block for the VPC
  PublicSubnetCidrBlocks:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: '10.0.0.0/24,10.0.1.0/24'
    Description: The CIDR blocks for the public subnets
  PrivateSubnetCidrBlocks:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: '10.0.2.0/24,10.0.3.0/24'
    Description: The CIDR blocks for the private subnets

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  VPCRouteTables:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC::RouteTable',
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC::Route'
    DependsOn: InternetGateway
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref VPCRouteTables
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.GatewayId
      Associations:
        - Ref: PublicSubnetAssociation

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC::RouteTable'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        Name: private-route-table

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    DependsOn: InternetGateway
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Select '0' . PublicSubnetCidrBlocks
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAZs | [0]
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        Name: public-subnet

  PrivateSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    DependsOn: InternetGateway
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Select '0' . PrivateSubnetCidrBlocks
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAZs | [1]
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        Name: private-subnet

  PublicSubnetAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::SubnetAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
